title: IC RegFin Legal advises investors on Spill Games seed fundraise
description: Spillvoy Gaming Private Limited, Spill Games, has raised $3.1 million from a seed fundraise co-led by Centre Court Capital and PeerCapital.IC RegFin Legal advised the co-lead investors Centre Court Capital and PeerCapital on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Anish Jaipuriar (Partner), Hardik Sabbarwal (Senior Associate) and Utsav Vats (Associate).Anish JaipuriarSpill Games is a Bengaluru-based mobile gaming company founded in 2024 by Om Misra, Tapan Ranjan, and Harsh Garg.
